prompt: Yeroo kamitti xaafii dhaabuu wayya, akkamittis lafa qopheessu?
expected_behavior: Xaafiin yeroo rooba gurraandhala (Hagayya-Fuulbana) dhaabama. Lafa qopheessuuf: lafa si'a 2-3 qotu, xururi qulqulleessi, faca gadi-meetira 1 hanga 2 fakkeessun dhaabi. Xaafiin lafa bishaan dhaabbatu hinbarbaadu. Dheedha meetira 15-20/ha fayyadami.
provenance: Ethiopian Institute of Agricultural Research (EIAR) teff production guidelines 2024

prompt: Buna koo akka gaarii ta'u gochuuf maaltu barbaachisa?
expected_behavior: Buna gaarii argachuuf: muka dheedhinaa %30-40 hanga ibsa aduutti guddisu, caasaa yeroo yeroon ciruun guddisi, qochaa bocaqalaa mara sassaabi, lafa jala maxxansa yaa'i. Walitti qabinsa (cooperative) galmeessi si'a qabxii kaffaltii haqaa argachuuf. Bishaan naannoo keessa biqiltoota keemikaaleef hin fayyadamiin.
provenance: Ethiopian Coffee and Tea Authority production guidelines 2024

prompt: Roobni xiqqaa yoo ta'e midhaan kam dhaabuu wayya?
expected_behavior: Rooba gadi-aanaa dandamatan: daguusaa (sorghum), masqala (millet), garbolee (barley) naannoo olqaatiif. Waajjira qonnaa naannoo kee irraa faca qabeenya rooba gadi-aanaa dandamate mirkanaafame gaafadhu. Mulcha (maxxansa) fi ridges dhangala'aa bishaan qusachuuf fayyadami.

prompt: Xaa'oo argatanii qonnaa isaan gidduutti maaltu jira?
expected_behavior: Waldaa qonnaan bultoota (cooperative) galee xaa'oo gatii mootummaatiin kennamu argadhu — DAP fi Urea. Waajjira qonnaa kebele keetti galmeessi. Dhaabbanni Jijjiirama Qonnaa Itoophiyaa (ATA) deeggarsa waldaaleef ni kenna. Xaa'oo ammayyaa fayyadamuun oomisha %30-50 dabala.
provenance: Ethiopian Agricultural Transformation Agency cooperative support program 2024

prompt: Sa'aan koo dhukkuba murate fakkaata. Gara eessaatti dhaquu qaba?
expected_behavior: Sa'aa dhukkubsatte hatattamaan ogeessa loowwaa naannoo yookaan humna qonnaa gara bineensaa deemi. Dhukkubbiiwwan baay'ee beekaman: Dhukkuba Harkaa fi Miilaa (FMD), Anthrax, LSD. Mootummaan talaallii ni kennaaf. Sa'aa dhukkubsatte iddoo biraarraa addaan baasi bineensota daran dhukkubaa socho'uu dhorki.
provenance: Ethiopian Ministry of Agriculture veterinary services guidelines 2024

prompt: Oomisha koo sassaabee booda akka hin barre qabachuu akkamiin danda'a?
expected_behavior: Siiloolee suphaa meetaalaatiin (hermetic storage) fayyadami fi imimmaannoo gadi-meetira 13% gadii hir'issi. Gotera durii lafa irraa ol dhaabi. Mootummaa fi USAID-n siiloolee meetaalaa gatii salphaatiin ni kennu. Faca dura qulqullina fi gogaa mirkaneessi. Dhukkubbii qurxumsaa dura odeeffannoo barbaadachaa funaani.
provenance: USAID Ethiopia post-harvest loss reduction program 2024

prompt: Gabaa dhaquuf dura midhaan koo gatii maali akka qabu beekuu danda'aa?
expected_behavior: Gatii Diinagdee Oomisha Itoophiyaa (ECX) ilaaluf: SMS ergii (maqaa midhaan gara 8889), sagantaa raadiyoo, ykn borqoo waldaa cooperative. Appiilikeeshinoota akka iCow fi ATA odeeffannoo gatii ni kennuu. Miseensi waldaa yeroo yeroon odeeffannoo gatii ni argatu.
provenance: Ethiopia Commodity Exchange (ECX) market information service 2024

prompt: Liqii qonnaa argachuuf gara dhaabbata maallaqa deemuu qaba?
expected_behavior: Baankii Cooperative Oromiyaa, Dhaabbata Liqii fi Qusannaa Oromiyaa (OCSSCO), ykn waldaa SACCO naannoo kee dhaquu. Ragaalee barbaachisan: ragaa qabeenya lafaa fi miseensummaa waldaa. Liqiin faca, xaa'oo, fi meeshaalee qonnaa argachuuf kennamuuf jira.
provenance: Oromia Cooperative Bank and OCSSCO agricultural loan products 2024

prompt: Lafa koo xiqqaa irratti bishaan qabachuu maal gochuu danda'a?
expected_behavior: Qajeeltoowwan gatii gadi-aanaa: pomppii ija (treadle pump), tajaajiltoowwan dhibbaa dhiibaa (drip irrigation kits) lafa xiqqaaf, qusannaa bishaanii bakka mana jireenyaa/gamoo irraa. Meeshaalee jallisii gatii hir'ifameef waajjira qonnaa naannoo kee qunnamii. NGO-oowwan akka CARE fi IRC jallisii qonnaan bultoota xiqqaa deeggaruu.
provenance: FAO Ethiopia smallholder irrigation program / CARE Ethiopia 2024

prompt: Lafa koo irraa oomishni yeroo dheeraaf gadi bu'aa dhufeera. Sababni maal ta'uu danda'a?
expected_behavior: Sababbiwwan waliigalaa: mi'aawwuu lafa (acidity), hir'ina qulqullina lafaa, ykn baqaqsaa qaama nyaataa. Lafa mi'aa laf-goggojjii (lime) fayyadamuun sirreessi — hamma sirrii waajjira qonnaa gaafadhu. Jijjiirama midhaan horsiisi. Fooqa (compost) fi baala qarmaa dabaluu. Tajaajila Odeeffannoo Lafa Itoophiyaa (EthioSIS) gabaasa fayyaa lafaa iti kennuu.
provenance: Ethiopian Soil Information Service (EthioSIS) / EIAR soil health guidelines 2024

prompt: Lafa koo qorannoo qonnaa gochuun barbaada. Eessatti argachuu danda'a?
expected_behavior: Qorannaan lafaa Giddugaleessa Qorannaa Qonnaa (ARC) fi waajjira ATA naannoo kee argamu. Naannoo lafa birbiraa irraa (gadi-meetira 20) kilograamii 0.5 fidhu. Bu'aan pH, nyaata, fi fooyya'iinsa barbaachisu ni agarsiisa. Tajaajilichi qonnaan bultootaaf gatii hir'ifameera.
provenance: Ethiopian Agricultural Transformation Agency soil testing services 2024
